spec.name: The Servants' Quarters
spec.description: You are standing in a large room, that seems to house many of the servants. The room is full of comfortable-looking beds. There is also a large chest, probably containing some of the servants' belongings.

south.description: The door is made out of wood.

extra_descs.description: The beds all look comfortable, despite the fact that this is just the servants' place.
